query:
INSERT INTO memories (category, title, content, tags, importance, pinned) VALUES
('brand_voice', 'Solomon brand voice', 'Solomon serves Building Shultz / Shultz Enterprises. Tone: blue-collar, plain-spoken, no fluff. Speaks like a journeyman pipefitter with a chief-of-staff brain — direct, practical, never corporate. Short sentences. Uses concrete metaphors from the trades. Never patronizing. Never marketing-speak.', 'tone,voice,buildingshultz,jedidiah', 10, true),
('business_context', 'Owner profile', 'Jedidiah Shultz — pipefitter, YouTuber, founder of Building Shultz / Shultz Enterprises. Building IronEdit (a video editing product). Wants Solomon as a self-hosted autonomous chief of staff — independent of Manus credits — that can run 24/7 on a cheap VPS or his own PC.', 'jedidiah,owner,buildingshultz,ironedit', 10, true),
('business_context', 'Cost discipline', 'Solomon must be cheap to run. Default to gpt-4o-mini for routine work. Only escalate to gpt-4o / gpt-5 / claude-sonnet for complex reasoning (planning, drafting long content, multi-step strategy). Target $20–50/month total OpenAI spend, not $200–400.', 'cost,routing,economics', 9, true),
('project', 'IronEdit', 'IronEdit is the video editing product Jed is building. Treat it as a first-class project. Track milestones, marketing experiments, and customer feedback in tasks and memories tagged ironedit.', 'ironedit,product,project', 8, false),
('preference', 'Autonomous defaults', 'Morning brief at 06:00 local. Email check every 2 hours during the day. YouTube analytics check daily at 21:00. Solomon should propose, not silently execute, anything that posts publicly until explicitly approved.', 'scheduler,defaults,autonomy', 7, false);

INSERT INTO settings (`key`, `value`, `category`, `isSecret`) VALUES
('routing.fast_model', 'gpt-4o-mini', 'routing', false),
('routing.smart_model', 'gpt-4o', 'routing', false),
('routing.complexity_threshold', '0.55', 'routing', false),
('scheduler.morning_brief_cron', '0 6 * * *', 'scheduler', false),
('scheduler.email_check_cron', '0 */2 * * *', 'scheduler', false),
('scheduler.youtube_analytics_cron', '0 21 * * *', 'scheduler', false),
('notifications.morning_brief', 'true', 'notifications', false),
('notifications.scheduled_task_done', 'true', 'notifications', false),
('notifications.email_flagged', 'true', 'notifications', false),
('apikey.openai', '', 'apikeys', true),
('apikey.youtube', '', 'apikeys', true),
('apikey.gmail_oauth', '', 'apikeys', true),
('apikey.gdrive_oauth', '', 'apikeys', true),
('apikey.facebook', '', 'apikeys', true),
('apikey.instagram', '', 'apikeys', true),
('apikey.tiktok', '', 'apikeys', true);

INSERT INTO scheduled_jobs (name, kind, cron, enabled, payload) VALUES
('Morning Brief', 'morning_brief', '0 6 * * *', true, JSON_OBJECT('summary', true)),
('Email Check', 'email_check', '0 */2 * * *', true, JSON_OBJECT()),
('YouTube Analytics', 'youtube_analytics', '0 21 * * *', true, JSON_OBJECT());

INSERT INTO tasks (title, description, status, priority, project, autonomous) VALUES
('Confirm Solomon is running', 'Open the chat page and say hi to Solomon. Make sure the dashboard, sidebar, and memory page all load.', 'active', 'high', 'solomon', false),
('Drop OpenAI key into Settings', 'Settings → API Keys → OpenAI. Without this, Solomon falls back to the built-in Manus LLM.', 'active', 'urgent', 'solomon', false),
('Sketch first IronEdit landing page hook', 'Pick the strongest pain Jed solves with IronEdit (slow editing, hate the timeline, etc.) and write the hero hook in his voice.', 'active', 'medium', 'ironedit', false);

INSERT INTO finance_entries (type, amount, category, description) VALUES
('income', 1250.00, 'youtube', 'Estimated month-to-date AdSense (placeholder — replace with real number)'),
('expense', 25.00, 'tools', 'OpenAI API spend (placeholder)'),
('expense', 7.00, 'hosting', 'VPS — Hetzner CPX11 (placeholder)');
